phrases.phrase: Redeyed Sentinel

Settings for the Redeyed Sentinel self-hosted CAPTCHA + IP-reputation provider. Free to install; the CAPTCHA stays inert until a Site Key and a Secret Key are entered below. Get both keys at https://redeyed.com (Lab -> Sentinel -> Sites); the Secret Key is shown once.
Sentinel Site Key (public)
Your public Sentinel site key. Safe to expose in the page; it is rendered into the captcha widget. Find it in Redeyed Lab -> Sentinel -> Sites.
Sentinel Secret Key (secret)

Your per-site Sentinel Secret Key. Used server-side only (sent in the POST body of the siteverify call) and never exposed to the browser. Find it in Redeyed Lab -> Sentinel -> Sites; it is shown only once. Keep this private.
Sentinel Base URL
Base URL of the Sentinel service. Defaults to https://redeyed.com. Only change this if you run a self-hosted Sentinel instance. No trailing slash needed.
Sentinel widget type

Optional. Which Sentinel challenge widget to render, e.g. behavioral, checkbox, press_hold or image_pick. Leave blank to use the default configured for your site. Rendered as data-widget on the captcha element.
Sentinel theme
Optional. Widget theme: auto, light or dark. Leave blank to follow the site default (auto, which matches the visitor's system preference). Rendered as data-theme.
Sentinel colour scheme
Optional. Colour scheme / accent used by the widget. Leave blank for the Sentinel default. Rendered as data-scheme.
Sentinel difficulty

Optional. Minimum challenge strength: easy, medium, hard, max (or 1-6). This only RAISES difficulty above Sentinel's adaptive baseline; it never lowers it. Leave blank to let Sentinel choose adaptively per visitor. Rendered as data-difficulty.
Sentinel widget width
Optional. Width for the widget container, e.g. full, 100% or 340px. Leave blank to use the Sentinel default width. Rendered as data-width.
Log blocked attempts
Record each blocked submission (IP, outcome, score) to the server error log (Admin CP -> Logs -> Server error log) for review. The Secret Key is never logged. On by default.
